mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO document_chunk (doc_id, kb_id, chunk_index, content, token_count, embedding, metadata) VALUES
( #{chunk.docId}, #{chunk.kbId}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.tokenCount}, #{embeddings[${idx}]}::vector, #{chunk.metadata} )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM document_chunk WHERE doc_id = #{docId}
SELECT id FROM document_chunk WHERE kb_id = #{kbId}
